About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Output Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the momentum rankings. MXL claims the top spot with a composite score of 96.8, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 703%, a pristine 1-month return of 187%, and perfect positioning above all four moving averages (30/50/100/200 day SMA). The stock demonstrates remarkable consistency across timeframes with a ratio_passes score of 4 and outperforms SPY by 678% over the year, while maintaining a strong bad_spy_score of 3.16 indicating resilience during market weakness. FPLSF follows as a second strong contender with 425% annualized returns and more moderate but steady ratio progression (ranging from 1.93 to 7.42), also passing all SMA gates and showing superior bad_spy_score resilience of 0.47. Both stocks display clean momentum signals with normal volatility profiles and no pullback flags, suggesting sustained uptrend momentum rather than mean reversion traps.
